scores.correctness_notes: Correctly shows relation.data[event.unit], iterating over relation.units, accessing remote app data, and writing local unit data. All core patterns match gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor issue: event.app on RelationChangedEvent — the gold standard uses event.relation.app for the remote app databag, not event.app directly. While RelationChangedEvent does have an .app attribute, the gold standard specifically uses event.relation.app. Also omits Relation.load() pattern but that's an omission not a hallucination.
